checks.name: Dashboard public route
checks.detail: Public/local Caddy now returns API 401 auth-required for /api/v1/miniapp/dashboard instead of Caddy 404.

checks.name: Generic API boundary
checks.detail: Generic /api/v1/tasks remains 404; no /api/v1/miniapp* wildcard was introduced.

checks.name: Regression tests
checks.detail: Bootstrap Caddy contract tests and API tests passed.
